channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Spurs beat Thunder 111-103 in Game 7 to win Western Conference and reach NBA Finals
item.description: Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs began the Western Conference finals with a win in Oklahoma City and closed the series there.

item.title: Zelenskyy says more pressure needed on Putin to negotiate peace deal
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy told 'Face the Nation' he hopes the U.S. is moving toward a drone deal.

item.title: Suspect in killings of three elderly men in Hawaii charged with murder
item.description: The suspect accused of killing three elderly men in a rural part of Hawaii's Big Island faces murder charges and other offenses.

item.title: Family visitations to resume at New Jersey immigration detention facility after clashes
item.description: Demonstrations outside Delaney Hall continued Saturday after another night of clashes between protesters and law enforcement.
